label: Transparent heather moor motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a heather moor motif cluster, isolated full subject, no surrounding landscape, no props, no text.
Subject: One natural sculptural cutout of moorland heath: dense purple heather sprigs in bloom, wiry brown stems, small evergreen heath leaves, peat-brown root mat and low hummock base, a few sky-grey lichen and weathered grass details, accurate upland heather texture, compact enough to work as a reusable catalog motif.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; do not crop the heather cluster; show the full low moorland plant form with an uneven peat base.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves purple heather blossoms, peat brown stems, muted green leaves, and cool sky-grey weathering detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no wide landscape, no decorative background, no second separate plant, no animals, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Heath light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Heath", derived from moorland heath and a heather moor motif. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible open landscape system.
Reference use: Use heather moor as the source of truth: purple heather blossoms, peat-brown stems and earth, muted evergreen heath leaves, pale lichen, wind-worn grass, and sky-grey open moorland atmosphere. The board must visibly respect these motif colors and textures.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Heath, Heather Moor, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: purple heather primary, peat brown grounding, sky grey surfaces, lichen pale accents, muted heath green support color, dark peat ink, cloud white cards, weathered mauve highlights, and restrained near-neutrals derived only from the motif.
Typography: open landscape product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use an airy humanist sans with sturdy data numerals and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, maps, filters, table numerals, field notes, and calm workflow states. Include short Japanese labels such as 地図, 検索, 記録, 観測.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, horizon line chart, area chart, field survey table, route list, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple restrained icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, and token chips.
Style: premium product design system, open landscape operations dashboard, sky-grey breathable surfaces, purple-heather primary actions, peat-brown text and borders, lichen accent chips, subtle heather-stem texture, wide horizon rhythm, confident hierarchy, compact but airy data density, restrained shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radii.
Text: use short readable labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Heath", no tiny illegible paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Heath dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Heath". It must feel like the same open landscape system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from heather moorland and the light-mode board.
Reference use: Preserve purple-heather primary controls, peat-brown grounding and borders, sky-grey typography guidance, lichen accent chips, heath-green support colors, heather-stem texture, 8px radius language, wide horizon rhythm, dashboard/data/forms/table/search/status/token coverage, and English plus Japanese typography guidance.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Heath, Dark Mode, Heather Moor, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: deepest peat background, warm dark brown panels, purple heather primary, mauve focus rings, muted heath green accents, pale lichen status, sky-grey text, weathered stone borders, and restrained near-neutrals derived only from the motif.
Typography: open landscape product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use an airy humanist sans with sturdy data numerals and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, maps, filters, table numerals, field notes, and calm workflow states. Include short Japanese labels such as 地図, 検索, 記録, 観測.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, horizon line chart, area chart, field survey table, route list, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple restrained icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, and token chips.
Visual details: dark background derived from wet peat and twilight moor, elevated panels in peat charcoal, sky-grey foreground text, purple-heather primary actions, mauve focus rings, muted heath-green navigation and success accents, pale lichen chips, subtle heather-stem texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, restrained shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radii.
Text: use short readable labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Heath", no tiny illegible paragraphs.
